sense.definition: a tendency in artistic form or style that is shared between a group of artists following the same ideology or aesthetic approach
any educational institution formed to train individuals in visual or fine arts
someone who is studying art either at a university or any other higher education institution
a workshop or studio where an artist or a designer works
a company in the business of selling items at auction

examples.x: Christie's and Sotheby's are renowned auction houses known for selling fine art and collectibles to high-profile collectors worldwide.
The auction house in town regularly hosts sales of antiques, jewelry, and rare books, attracting both local enthusiasts and international bidders.
The estate decided to consign their collection of vintage cars to an auction house specializing in automotive auctions.
Online auction houses have become increasingly popular, allowing people to bid on items from the comfort of their homes using digital platforms.
He attended an auction at a prestigious auction house to bid on a painting by a famous artist that had been in private hands for decades.

sense.definition: someone who gathers things, as a job or hobby

examples.x: The art collector spent millions on a rare painting at the auction.
The museum reached out to a renowned artifact collector to procure pieces for their upcoming exhibit.
As a passionate art collector, she traveled the world in search of unique and valuable pieces to add to her gallery.
The antique collector spent years scouring flea markets and estate sales to find rare and valuable artifacts for their collection.

sense.definition: a group of particular objects put together and considered as a whole

examples.x: Her collection of vintage postcards showcased the history of different cities.
The museum's collection included artifacts from ancient civilizations.
The library's rare book collection attracted scholars from around the world.
They admired the artist's new collection of abstract paintings at the gallery.

sense.definition: an individual who is an expert of art, food, music, etc. and can judge its quality

examples.x: As a wine connoisseur, he could discern subtle nuances in aroma and flavor, effortlessly identifying the region and vintage of each bottle.
The art connoisseur eagerly perused the gallery, admiring brushstrokes and compositions with a discerning eye honed by years of study and appreciation.
A connoisseur of fine cuisine, she savored every bite of the meticulously prepared tasting menu, delighting in the harmonious balance of flavors and textures.
With a connoisseur's palate for coffee, he could distinguish between beans from different origins and roasting techniques, savoring each cup as a sensory experience.
The music connoisseur curated a playlist spanning genres and eras, showcasing lesser-known gems alongside timeless classics for an eclectic listening experience.

sense.definition: an organization or a person who is responsible for preserving, repairing, or restoring works of art, cultural sites, or other types of historical heritage
a public event in which objects such as paintings, photographs, etc. are shown

examples.x: The museum's latest exhibit features a stunning collection of contemporary art from around the world.
Visitors were impressed by the interactive exhibits at the science center, which allowed them to engage with various scientific concepts.
The artist's exhibit at the gallery received rave reviews from critics and art enthusiasts alike.
The history museum's exhibit on ancient civilizations provided fascinating insights into life thousands of years ago.
The zoo's newest exhibit showcases endangered species and highlights conservation efforts to protect their habitats.

sense.definition: a public event at which paintings, photographs, or other things are shown

examples.x: The art museum's latest exhibition features works by contemporary artists from around the world.
She visited the photography exhibition to see the stunning black-and-white portraits.
The annual exhibition of local crafts attracts thousands of visitors each year.
The science fair included an exhibition of innovative student projects.
The gallery hosted an exhibition of vintage posters from the early 20th century.

sense.definition: an event in which a selected few are invited to look at an art gallery, watch a movie, etc. before it is open to the public
an individual who financially supports an artist, charity, cause, etc.

examples.x: As a dedicated supporter of the cause, she became a patron of the animal shelter, making regular donations to provide care and medical treatment for rescued animals.
The renowned artist was fortunate to have a wealthy patron who provided financial backing for their upcoming exhibition, ensuring its successful realization.
Recognizing the importance of education, the generous couple became patrons of a scholarship fund, offering financial assistance to deserving students.

sense.definition: the period of time during which an artist, composer, musician, etc. is asked to work in a university or another institution
a public exhibition of an artist's work over a period of time, showing their career development

examples.x: The museum hosted a retrospective of the painter's entire career.
The retrospective showcased the artist's evolution over five decades.
A retrospective of her work will open at the art gallery next month.

sense.definition: a professional who is responsible for buying and selling artworks or brokering such an exchange
a building where works of art are displayed for the public to enjoy

examples.x: The new art gallery downtown features a rotating collection of contemporary artists and their works.
She spent the afternoon exploring the art gallery, captivated by the vibrant colors and unique styles on display.
The art gallery hosts regular events, including workshops and lectures, to engage the community in creative discussions.
Many visitors flock to the art gallery during the annual festival, eager to see the latest exhibitions.
The local art gallery also offers art classes for beginners, providing a space for creativity and learning.

sense.definition: a professional who advises clients on acquiring, managing and investing in art
the act of evaluating someone or something in order to form an opinion or judgment about them
someone who is in charge of a museum, taking care of a collection, artwork, etc.

examples.x: The museum curator is responsible for preserving and interpreting the art collection.
She consulted with the curator to learn more about the historical artifacts on display.
The curator organized a special exhibition featuring rare manuscripts from the library's archives.
As a curator, he oversees the acquisition and cataloging of new artworks for the museum.
The curator's expertise in art history ensures accurate interpretation of the museum's exhibits.

sense.definition: a place in which works of art are shown or sold to the public

examples.x: She spent the afternoon wandering through the gallery, admiring the vibrant paintings and thought-provoking sculptures.
The gallery's latest installation focuses on contemporary issues, using art as a medium for social commentary.
Many people attended the opening night at the gallery, eager to meet the artists and discuss their work.
The gallery offers workshops for aspiring artists to learn new techniques and improve their skills.

sense.definition: a form of modern art that consists of mixed-media assemblages, designed for a specific place and time period

examples.x: The museum's new exhibition features stunning installation art pieces.
She created an installation art project using recycled materials.
His installation art was interactive, allowing visitors to become part of the work.
The installation art at the festival drew crowds with its vibrant and dynamic displays.
The installation art at the festival drew crowds with its vibrant and dynamic displays.

sense.definition: a collection of an artist's, writer's, or creator's work that is used to showcase their skills, experience and suitability for opportunities
a formal request for an artist to paint, design or compose a piece of art
